---
title: "test___init___empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test___init___empire.py"
loc: 10
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.90
style_score: 4.49
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.05
---

## Intent
The `test___init___empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_src_is_importable_as_a_package. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_src_is_importable_as_a_package. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src](file://src)

### Exports
- `test_src_is_importable_as_a_package`
